King Arthur (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $51,877,963Details
International Box Office $151,775,561
Worldwide Box Office $203,653,524
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$15,193,907 (29.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.41 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:25.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$90,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,086 opening theaters/3,086 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $99,913,110

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 7th, 2004 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: July 15th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: December 21st, 2004 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense battle sequences, a scene of sensuality and some language
Running Time: 126 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Intertitle, Prologue
Plot point: Non-Chronological, One Last Job, Self-sacrifice, Sex Crimes
Social setting: Sword and Sandal
Source material: Inspired by a True Story
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: Ancient Rome, Medieval
Source:Based on Folk Tale/Legend/Fairytale
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Touchstone Pictures, Jerry Bruckheimer
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom, Ireland
Languages: English, Latin, Welsh, Gaelic
